ddls:
CREATE TABLE "themes" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theme */,
  "theme_name" TEXT /* Name of the theme */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the theme was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the theme was last updated */,
  "theme_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the theme */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the theme is currently active or not */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the creator */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the last updater */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the theme is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the theme it belongs to */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color (e.g., Primary, Secondary) */,
  "color_value" TEXT /* Hex or RGB value of the color */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* A standardized code for the color */,
  "color_type" TEXT /* Type of color (e.g., primary, secondary, success, info, warning, danger) */,
  "opacity" REAL /* Opacity level of the color (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_colors_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("theme_id") REFERENCES themes ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "background_gradients" (
  "gradient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each background gradient */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the theme it belongs to */,
  "gradient_name" TEXT /* Name of the gradient */,
  "gradient_value" TEXT /* CSS value for the gradient */,
  "gradient_type" TEXT /* Type of gradient (e.g., linear, radial) */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the gradient (e.g., to right, to bottom) */,
  "color_stops" TEXT /* List of color stops for the gradient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gradient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_background_gradients_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("theme_id") REFERENCES themes ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "text_styles" (
  "text_style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text style */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the theme it belongs to */,
  "text_style_name" TEXT /* Name of the text style (e.g., text-primary) */,
  "text_style_value" TEXT /* CSS class name for the text style */,
  "font_family" TEXT /* The font family used in the text style */,
  "font_size" TEXT /* The font size */,
  "font_weight" TEXT /* The font weight */,
  "line_height" TEXT /* The line height */,
  "text_transform" TEXT /* Text transformation */,
  "text_decoration" TEXT /* Text decoration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("text_style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_styles_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("theme_id") REFERENCES themes ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "borders" (
  "border_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each border style */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the theme it belongs to */,
  "border_name" TEXT /* Name of the border style (e.g., border-primary) */,
  "border_value" TEXT /* CSS class name for the border style */,
  "border_width" TEXT /* The border width */,
  "border_style" TEXT /* The border style */,
  "border_radius" TEXT /* The border radius */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("border_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_borders_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("theme_id") REFERENCES themes ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "theme_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a theme */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the theme it belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number (incremental) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_created_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the creator of this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_theme_versions_version_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("version_created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_theme_versions_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("theme_id") REFERENCES themes ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the theme being contributed to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the contribution */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., created, updated) */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date when the contribution was made */,
  "contribution_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the contribution */,
  "contribution_status" TEXT /* Status of the contribution (e.g., pending, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_contributions_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("theme_id") REFERENCES themes ("theme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_contributions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, developer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department the user belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "theme_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the theme being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the comment was created */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., active, hidden) */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_theme_comments_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("theme_id") REFERENCES themes ("theme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_theme_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_theme_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES theme_comments ("comment_id")
)
